title: Dammam, Eastern Province — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dammam, Eastern Province: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dammam is a city in Eastern Province with a population of 1,252,000. The capital of the Eastern Province, a major oil industry center and port city on the Arabian Gulf.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
